seo.pageTitle: Incheon to Seoul Private Cruise Shore Excursion | AtoC Korea
seo.metaDescription: Private 8-hour shore excursion from Incheon Cruise Terminal to Seoul: Gyeongbokgung, Bukchon, Insadong, N Seoul Tower, Myeongdong. Sailaway-time guarantee.
primaryKeywords: Incheon port to Seoul private car
seo.title: 仁川首爾私人包車郵輪岸上觀光 · 8小時門到門 | AtoC Korea
seo.description: 仁川郵輪碼頭出發首爾私人包車一日遊：景福宮→北村韓屋村→廣藏市場→仁寺洞。完全私人包車，無陌生旅客，路線可客製，準時返船保證。含飯店接送。

catalog_card.title: 仁川至首爾私人包車郵輪岸上一日遊
catalog_card.priceLabel: Price varies by vehicle / group size — confirm at booking
catalog_card.shortCardDescription: An 8-hour private car charter built around your ship's all-aboard time, not a fixed schedule. Gangway pickup at Incheon Cruise Terminal, English-speaking driver-guide, and a customizable route through Gyeongbokgung Palace, Bukchon Hanok Village + Insadong, lunch of your choice, N Seoul Tower, and Myeongdong or Jogyesa Temple. The driver-guide holds a 60-minute traffic buffer before sailaway so you never miss the ship.
catalog_card.subtitle: Private car charter for cruise passengers — gangway pickup at Incheon, fully customizable Seoul day, terminal drop-off with 60-minute sailaway buffer.
catalog_card.region: 首爾（仁川郵輪碼頭出發）

headlineLine1: 郵輪碼頭直達王宮，依您的返船時間量身打造——
headlineLine2: 首爾私人包車，專屬您的團體，含返船保證

price.priceNote: 價格尚未確定。私人行程費用視車輛大小而異（轎車1–3人、廂型車4–6人、大型廂型車7–9人）。確認後，AtoC Korea直售價格享9折優惠。

meta.duration: ≈ 8 hours (pickup ≈ 09:30 from gangway, terminal drop-off ≈ 17:30; calibrated to your ship)

itineraryStops.name: Cruise terminal gangway pickup
itineraryStops.description: **郵輪舷梯直接接送——全日行程最根本的保障**。仁川郵輪碼頭距首爾市中心約50–60公里，私家車是唯一可完全掌控時間的接送方式。司機兼導遊持名牌在入境大廳等候，完全服務您的專屬團隊，沒有拼車、沒有等待、沒有轉乘。注意：仁川設有多個碼頭終端（永宗島及松島），請提前向郵輪公司確認所使用的碼頭。您的全員上船時間是當日唯一的截止限制，司機兼導遊以此為唯一基準規劃全日路線，預留至少60分鐘的交通緩衝時間。接送時間依您的實際下船時間而定，並非固定時刻，確保最大靈活度。
highlights: **司機兼導遊持名牌等候**——仁川郵輪碼頭入境大廳
仁川至首爾市中心約**50–60公里**——私家車是最省時可靠的方式
**無拼車、無等待**——全程服務您的專屬團隊
注意：仁川有**多個碼頭**（永宗島／松島）——請提前確認
接送時間依**您的下船時間**而定，非固定時刻
全員上船時間是唯一截止基準——預留**至少60分鐘**交通緩衝
timeUsed: Disembark cruise ship and clear Korean immigration (~30 min)
Meet driver-guide at terminal curbside with name placard
Begin private 60-90 min drive to first Seoul stop
Pre-departure check: K-ETA / e-Arrival Card status verification (~5 min)
Optional Songdo Central Park weather-fallback detour (~15 min if applicable)
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: **全日行程最根本的保障**。司機兼導遊完全服務您的專屬團隊，船班的全員上船時間已內建於行程中，而語言溝通障礙也由此迎刃而解。碼頭至首爾市中心約60公里，私家車是唯一可完全掌控時間的接送方式——沒有等車時間，沒有轉乘，司機以郵輪的離港時間為唯一的截止限制。

smartNotes.tip: Provide ship name + scheduled arrival + all-aboard time at booking. The driver-guide will arrive 30-60 min after your scheduled docking to allow immigration clearance. Cruise terminal Korean address: 인천항 크루즈터미널 (연수구 국제항만대로 438).

_poi_meta.note: Operational pickup stop; references KB POI for terminal facts
sources: Korea Tourism Organization (VisitKorea — Incheon Cruise Terminal listing)
Visit Korea — Incheon Tourist Attraction official
Wikipedia (Incheon Port + Songdo International Business District)

itineraryStops.name: Gyeongbokgung Palace + Royal Guard ceremony
itineraryStops.description: 景福宮——「上天大賜之宮」——是朝鮮王朝（1392至1910年）的主宮殿，**1395年**在新都漢陽建成。三大核心亮點：**勤政殿** — 韓國最大的木造建築；**慶會樓** — 48根石柱蓮花池宴會亭；**香遠亭** — 韓國最多人拍攝的庭園景觀。**皇家衛兵換崗儀式**在興禮門每日**10:00和14:00**舉行（約20分鐘）。**週二休館**，遇此情況將改為昌德宮（UNESCO世界遺產）。穿韓服者**免費入場**。
highlights: 朝鮮王朝主宮殿 — 1395年建於新首爾
勤政殿 — 韓國最大的木造建築
慶會樓 — 48根石柱蓮花池宴會亭
香遠亭 — 韓國最多人拍攝的庭園景觀
興禮門皇家衛兵換崗儀式（每日10:00 + 14:00）
**週二休館** — 替代方案為昌德宮（UNESCO世界遺產1997年）
穿韓服者免費入場
皇家衛兵換崗儀式自1996年起重現——2016年恢復
光化門城門衛兵儀式11:00+13:00
timeUsed: Driver-guide drop-off at Gwanghwamun Square (~5 min)
Royal Guard Changing Ceremony if 10:00 timing (~20 min)
Throne Halls + Gyeonghoeru + Hyangwonjeong walk (~35-40 min)
Photo time + reassembly at vehicle
Optional National Folk Museum or National Palace Museum extension (within grounds, free) (~15 min if interested)
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: **景福宮是首爾第一必訪景點，也是私人郵輪一日遊的天然開場首選**。私人專屬的彈性節奏允許在皇家衛兵交接儀式及亭臺閣宇攝影上多加停留，這是拼團大型觀光巴士所做不到的。景福宮亦提供韓服出租，方便希望就地換裝入鏡的賓客。

visitBasics.hours: Mar-May, Sep-Oct: 09:00-18:00; Jun-Aug: 09:00-18:30; Nov-Feb: 09:00-17:00 (last admission 1 hr before close)
visitBasics.admission: Adult 3,000 KRW / Child 1,500 KRW; FREE for hanbok-wearers
visitBasics.walking: Moderate — flat extensive grounds; ~1.5-2 km of walking through main complex

convenience.restroom: At main entrance, mid-grounds, rear pavilion area
convenience.parking: Driver-guide drops at Gwanghwamun and parks separately

smartNotes.photo: Gwanghwamun gate at sunrise / golden hour. Royal Guard Changing Ceremony 10:00 + 14:00. Gyeonghoeru reflected in lotus pond. Hyangwonjeong covered bridge in spring (cherry blossoms) or autumn (foliage).
smartNotes.facilities: National Folk Museum + National Palace Museum INSIDE Gyeongbokgung grounds (free admission). Cafes, restrooms, gift shop near entrance.
smartNotes.tip: Time arrival for 10:00 Changing of the Guard. Skip Tuesday — Changdeokgung substitute. If your group is interested in palace architecture beyond surface-level photos, ask the driver-guide for a 30-min walking commentary on Joseon hierarchy and royal etiquette.

sources: Cultural Heritage Administration of Korea (Royal Palaces & Tombs Center)

itineraryStops.name: Bukchon Hanok Village + Insadong
itineraryStops.description: **北村（「北部村落」）**是一個有**600年歷史的韓屋住宅區**，夾在景福宮和昌德宮之間——今日是首爾最大的保存韓屋群落（約900棟傳統房屋）。標誌性路線沿**北村八景**而行，第6景桂洞길是首爾最多人拍攝的傳統建築景觀。北村是有人居住的活躍社區（非博物館）——居民要求安靜時間和限制入口攝影。從北村南緣出發，**仁寺洞（인사동）**步行5至10分鐘可達。仁寺洞融合了4層螺旋形**Ssamzigil文化廣場**（70多家工藝品店、畫廊、咖啡廳和屋頂露台）、傳統茶館、韓紙工作坊、陶瓷畫廊，以及韓國紀念品商販。**週末限制車輛通行（週六至週日）**。
highlights: 北村八景（8個著名觀景點）— 韓屋屋頂線 + N首爾塔（第6景）
約900棟保存韓屋 — 首爾最大傳統住宅區
仁寺洞Ssamzigil 4層螺旋文化廣場（70多家店鋪）
傳統茶館、韓紙工作坊、高麗青瓷畫廊
北村至仁寺洞步行5至10分鐘
週末限制車輛通行（週六至週日）
**約600年歷史** — 朝鮮王朝高階官員和貴族居所
**聯合宮殿套票₩10,000/成人**涵蓋4座宮殿 + 宗廟
timeUsed: Driver-guide drop-off near Bukchon entrance (~5 min)
Bukchon 8 Views walk + photos (~30-40 min)
Walk south to Insadong (~5-10 min)
Insadong Ssamzigil + craft shopping (~30 min)
Reassembly at vehicle
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: **將北村與仁寺洞合併為一個75分鐘的停留，體現了私人旅遊的彈性**。司機兼導遊在北村北端下客、仁寺洞南端接回，省去折返步行。這兩個景點是首爾保存最好的朝鮮時代步行街，相距僅步行10分鐘，組合效率遠勝獨立安排。

visitBasics.closed: Open year-round (some Insadong galleries closed Mondays)
visitBasics.admission: Free; pay-as-you-go for purchases, teahouses, workshops
visitBasics.walking: Moderate — Bukchon has cobbled, sloped alleys; Insadong is flat

convenience.restroom: Tourist Information Center at Bukchon entrance + Anguk Station Exit 6

smartNotes.photo: Bukchon 8 Gyeong #6 viewpoint at Gye-dong-gil. Hanbok-wearers framed against tile-roof gables. Ssamzigil spiral interior + rooftop terrace. Korean wedding-color threads at hanbok-accessory shops.
smartNotes.facilities: Tourist Information Centers, traditional teahouses, hanji workshops, ceramic galleries, multiple cafes throughout. Balwoo Gongyang (Michelin temple cuisine) at Jogyesa nearby.
smartNotes.tip: Visit Bukchon before noon when residents are out + lanes are quietest. Insadong best on weekends when pedestrian-only. Best souvenirs: hanji paper crafts, traditional ink stamps (dojang), small ceramics, traditional tea sampler boxes. If interested in hanbok rental — shops cluster at Bukchon's southwestern edge, ~15,000-20,000 KRW for 4 hr.

_poi_meta.note: Combined Bukchon + Insadong stop reflecting the 5-10 min walk between them
sources: Jongno-gu District Office (Bukchon Hanok Village preservation program)

itineraryStops.name: Lunch (your choice)
itineraryStops.description: **私人行程真正的午餐自選優勢**——拼團郵輪岸上遊只能前往固定餐廳，但私人包車賓客往往有特定飲食需求或偏好。午餐選項涵蓋：**삼겹살（五花肉BBQ）**搭配泡菜及配菜；**불고기（醬燒牛肉）**定食套餐；**냉면（冷麵）**——尤其適合夏季；或韓式傳統**한정식（韓式定食）**提供多道配菜。清真餐、純素及無麩質選項可在部分輪替餐廳提供——請於預訂時提出。司機兼導遊會根據您的需求及午後行程目的地，預先推薦餐廳並安排最優化路線，確保午餐成為行程亮點而非障礙。
highlights: **完全客製化**——根據您的飲食需求及偏好選擇餐廳
**삼겹살（五花肉BBQ）**、**불고기（醬燒牛肉）**、**냉면（冷麵）**等韓式精選
**清真餐、純素及無麩質**選項可應要求安排
**無強制購物站**——私人行程不設商業壓力
導遊根據午後行程**預先推薦餐廳**並優化路線
接送時收集飲食需求；可提前確認菜單
timeUsed: Driver-guide drop-off at chosen venue
Meal (~45-50 min)
Reassembly at vehicle
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: **真正的午餐自選是私人旅遊的核心價值所在**。拼團郵輪岸上遊只能前往固定餐廳，但私人郵輪賓客往往有特定飲食需求或強烈偏好（如清真餐∕純素∕無麩質∕海鮮過敏）。司機兼導遊會根據您的需求預先推薦餐廳，並在訂位時確認菜單，確保午餐成為行程亮點而非障礙。

visitBasics.admission: Pay-as-you-go (12,000 — 120,000 KRW range depending on choice)

smartNotes.tip: Communicate dietary preferences (vegetarian, halal, no-spicy, gluten-free) at booking. Royal court cuisine at Korea House requires advance reservation — book 24+ hr ahead. Cash recommended for Gwangjang Market option (10,000-20,000 KRW per person).

_poi_meta.note: Customizable lunch — 4 vetted options spanning streetfood to royal court cuisine

itineraryStops.name: N Seoul Tower (Namsan)
itineraryStops.description: **N首爾塔（南山首爾塔）**是首爾最具代表性的地標——矗立於南山（243公尺）頂的一座高**236.7公尺**的廣播觀景塔，塔頂海拔高度達**479.7公尺**。最初於**1969至1971年建設**，**1980年對外開放**，並於2005年12月CJ Foodville改建觀景樓層後更名為「N首爾塔」。首爾市政府2012年外籍旅遊者調查認定其為**韓國第1大觀光景點**，每年約**1,200萬人次**到訪。標誌性體驗：**360度觀景台**（成人₩21,000）；露台上的**同心鎖牆**；**N Grill旋轉餐廳**（約每48分鐘一圈，提前訂座者免費入觀景台）；以及**南山纜車** — 韓國第一條空中纜車（1962年開通，路程605公尺，約3分鐘）。韓劇拍攝記錄：《來自星星的你》、《花樣男子》等。**計程車禁止進入公園** — 只能搭纜車或接駁巴士。
highlights: 首爾最具代表性地標 — 236.7公尺塔，塔頂海拔479.7公尺
1969至1971年建設，1980年開放，2005年更名N首爾塔
外籍旅遊者調查韓國第1大景點（2012年）；每年約1,200萬人次
標誌性同心鎖牆 + N Grill旋轉餐廳（訂座者免費入觀景台）
南山纜車 — 韓國第一條空中纜車（1962年），約3分鐘
韓劇拍攝：《來自星星的你》、《花樣男子》、《韓版花遊記》
**計程車禁止入園** — 只能搭纜車或接駁巴士
**南山纜車（1962年）** = 韓國第一條空中纜車
timeUsed: Driver-guide drop-off at Namsan Cable Car base or shuttle bus stop (~5 min)
Cable car ride up (~3 min) OR shuttle bus (~5 min)
Observation deck or panoramic concourse views (~30-35 min)
Locks of Love photo + cafe stop (~10-15 min)
Cable car / shuttle down + return to vehicle
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: **N首爾塔是「這張照片就代表我來過韓國」的第一地標**——360°視野讓初訪者一眼掌握首爾地理全貌（北岳山在北、漢江在南、江南在東）。與拼團郵輪岸上遊不同，私人行程到達時間靈活，可在日落前後的黃金光線窗口抵達，拍攝效果遠優於固定時段。

visitBasics.hours: Observation deck weekdays 10:30-22:00; weekends 10:00-23:00 (last admission 30 min before close). Cable car 10:00-23:00 (Mon stops 09:00-14:00 for inspection)
visitBasics.admission: Observatory Adult 21,000 / Senior+Child 16,000 KRW; Cable Car Adult RT ~14,000 KRW separate; FREE base plaza views
visitBasics.walking: Moderate — vehicle drops at Namsan Cable Car base or shuttle bus stop; cable car or short walk up

convenience.restroom: Multiple levels of tower; observatory restrooms with floor-to-ceiling windows
convenience.parking: Driver-guide drops at Namsan Yejang Parking or Namsan Cable Car base

smartNotes.photo: Tower with Seoul skyline at night is the iconic shot — the panoramic concourse at the base is FREE and nearly as good as the paid observatory. Love Locks wall on terrace. Sunset from observatory windows.
smartNotes.facilities: N Grill revolving restaurant (free observatory with reservation), HanCook (free observatory with reservation), Cinnabon, A Twosome Place, multiple cafes, Game Plaza arcade.
smartNotes.tip: **FREE observatory hack**: book N Grill or HanCook in advance. Otherwise, the panoramic concourse views at the base are mostly FREE. Visit at sunset for the day-to-night transition (queue at 17:00 for 18:00 sunset in summer). Cable car queues hit 20+ min on weekends — plan accordingly. NEVER take a taxi — taxis are prohibited from the park.

itineraryStops.name: Myeongdong OR Jogyesa Temple (your choice)
itineraryStops.description: 當天最後一個正式景點，提供兩個截然不同的首爾終章選擇。**選項A — 明洞**：首爾中區的**第1大購物和K-Beauty街區**。主要韓國美妝旗艦店（悅詩風吟、伊蒂之屋、Olive Young）提供大方的免費試用品。明洞天主堂（建於1898年——韓國第一座磚造哥特式天主教堂）。街頭美食：旋風薯條串、花煎、芝士玉米熱狗、糖葫蘆（大多數路邊攤只收現金）。**選項B — 曹溪寺**：曹溪宗——韓國最大佛教宗派的首都中心寺廟。大雄殿是首爾最大的寺廟建築。**天然紀念物第9號：500年樹齡白松**。十層石塔供奉泰國王室贈予的10顆佛陀舍利。**免費入場**。農曆佛誕日前後的**蓮燈節（UNESCO非物質文化遺產）**。首爾市區唯一主要傳統寺廟。司機導遊根據您的團體興趣帶往其中一個選項。
highlights: **明洞（選項A）**：首爾第1大購物/K-美妝街區 + 1898年明洞天主堂
主要K-美妝旗艦店提供大方免費試用品
明洞街頭美食：旋風薯條、花煎、芝士玉米熱狗、糖葫蘆
**曹溪寺（選項B）**：曹溪宗首都中心寺廟（韓國最大佛教宗派）
大雄殿 = 首爾最大的寺廟建築；500年樹齡白松（天然紀念物第9號）
曹溪寺免費入場；首爾市區唯一主要傳統寺廟
司機導遊根據您的團體興趣調整選擇
**明洞天主堂（1898年）** — 韓國第一座磚造哥特式天主教堂；1987年民主化運動重要庇護所
**樂天百貨公司明洞總館** — 含屋頂花園+觀景台（免費）；韓國最大旅遊退稅窗口
timeUsed: Driver-guide drop-off at chosen venue (~5 min)
Self-paced exploration (~50 min)
Reassembly at vehicle
Optional Myeongdong Cathedral interior visit (5-min walk from main shopping street, FREE) (~10 min)
Optional Lotte Department Store rooftop garden + tax-refund counter (~15 min)
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: **明洞對曹溪寺的選擇，涵蓋了「在首爾最後一個小時」最自然的兩種心境**：「購物＋美食」對「沉澱＋感受」。之所以設計為二選一，是因為這種客製化選擇本身就是私人包車的核心賣點——而非強制安排單一景點。選擇權在於賓客，導遊負責落實。

visitBasics.hours: Myeongdong: shops 10:30-22:00, street food 12:00-22:00. Jogyesa: grounds 24/7, main halls 06:00-18:00
visitBasics.admission: Both FREE (Myeongdong purchases pay-as-you-go; Jogyesa fee-free)
visitBasics.walking: Easy at both — Myeongdong flat pedestrian zone; Jogyesa flat compact temple grounds

convenience.restroom: Myeongdong: Lotte/Shinsegae department stores, subway stations. Jogyesa: on temple grounds

smartNotes.photo: Myeongdong: main pedestrian street at evening illumination with N Seoul Tower in the distance; Myeongdong Cathedral Gothic façade. Jogyesa: Daeungjeon Main Hall + Lotus Lanterns (May) + 500-year-old Baeksong pine + ten-story stone pagoda.
smartNotes.facilities: Myeongdong: department stores, K-beauty flagships, street food, Tourist Information Centers, tax-refund counters. Jogyesa: Buddhist souvenir shops, foreign-language information center, Balwoo Gongyang Michelin temple cuisine restaurant 5 min away.
smartNotes.tip: **Myeongdong**: bring CASH 20,000 KRW. Free K-beauty samples generous. POPMART for Labubu blind-boxes. **Jogyesa**: wear modest clothing entering Main Hall. Visit during Lotus Lantern Festival (May) for the iconic illumination experience. Pair with Insadong (5-min walk) if time allows.

_poi_meta.note: Customizable choice between Myeongdong (shopping/streetfood) and Jogyesa Temple (Buddhist cultural)
sources: Lotte Department Store official (Myeongdong main branch)

itineraryStops.name: Return to Incheon Cruise Terminal
itineraryStops.description: **內建回船保障的返程安排**。私人行程結構意味著您的團隊無需等候其他乘客在多個下車點依序等待——司機直接駛往仁川郵輪碼頭。**標準緩衝時間計算**：全員上船時間減30分鐘（郵輪公司通常要求）再減至少60分鐘的首爾至仁川交通時間，合計在您規劃的最後一站前約90分鐘出發。首爾至仁川車程視尖峰時段及路況可能需要60至90分鐘——司機實時監測交通並相應調整。如遇郵輪公司通知全員上船時間提前，請即時透過WhatsApp通知司機兼導遊以便重新規劃尾段。
highlights: **直接返回碼頭**——無拼車等待，無多點下車
**標準緩衝計算**：全員上船前30分鐘＋60分鐘交通緩衝
首爾至仁川車程視路況**約60–90分鐘**
司機**實時監測交通狀況**，必要時調整路線
如全員上船時間提前，可透過**WhatsApp即時通知**司機重新規劃
行李全程留在車上——**門到門直達服務**
timeUsed: Boarding vehicle at final Seoul stop
60-90 min drive via expressway
Curbside drop-off at terminal — proceed to ship re-entry
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: **內建回船保障的返程安排**。私人行程結構意味著您的團隊無需等候其他乘客在多個下車點依序等待；司機直接駛往碼頭。標準緩衝：全員上船時間前60分鐘以上扣除首爾市區交通時間，足以應對首爾至仁川60–90分鐘的路況變數。

smartNotes.tip: Cruise terminal Korean address: 인천항 크루즈터미널 (연수구 국제항만대로 438) — keep handy. All-aboard time on your cruise card; confirm before driver-guide picks you up at last stop. Rare-traffic note: expressway delays during Korean public holidays (Chuseok, Lunar New Year) may extend transit.

_poi_meta.note: Operational return stop with sail-away buffer

routePhases.description: Incheon Cruise Terminal → central Seoul via expressway.
Gyeongbokgung (75 min), short transfer, Bukchon Hanok Village + Insadong (75 min) — all walkable cluster.
Local restaurant + N Seoul Tower or quick city stop.
Myeongdong shopping/street food OR Jogyesa Temple.
Seoul → Incheon Cruise Terminal with 60-minute buffer before all-aboard.

routeShapeIntro.title: 行程動線總覽
routeShapeIntro.subtitle: A point-to-point loop that starts and ends at your ship's gangway. The Seoul itinerary itself is a cluster, not a line — Gyeongbokgung, Bukchon, Insadong, and Myeongdong are all within a 20-minute radius of each other, which is what makes a 7–9 hour port day workable. The driver-guide's main job, after the cultural commentary, is keeping your sail-away time visible at every transition.

bestFor: 首次遊覽該地區的旅客
lessIdealFor: 尋找固定出發、拼團行程的旅客（本行程為私人包車，需單獨預訂）
人數超出車輛載客上限的郵輪團體（轎車1–3人、SUV 4–6人、廂型車7人以上；請在預訂時告知）
預算優先的旅客——私人形式費用高於拼團郵輪岸上遊
全員上船窗口不足7小時的旅客（時間吃緊）

items.label: 行程圍繞您的全員上船時間，而非固定時刻表
items.detail: 一般拼團行程按運營商時間運行，而非按您的時間。私人郵輪岸上遊從您下船的那一刻開始，在全員上船時間前充裕結束，司機兼導遊預留60分鐘安全緩衝以應對首爾交通。

items.label: 在碼頭舷梯直接接客，而非「在首爾某站集合」
items.detail: 仁川郵輪碼頭距首爾市中心約50公里。公共交通意味著計程車→仁川機場→AREX鐵路→地鐵→步行，輕易耗去90分鐘以上，一旦延誤風險極大。私家車直達門到門，行李亦可留在車上。

items.label: 沒有強制購物站，沒有40人大團
items.detail: 許多大型郵輪岸上遊設有強制人蔘店或免稅品停留，耗費您60–90分鐘寶貴時間。私家車不存在此類商業壓力：您按自己的意願停留，時間自己掌控，同行只有自己的團隊。

items.label: 當日隨機應變的客製化
items.detail: 衛兵交接因雨取消？略過北村改去曹溪寺？想以韓戰紀念館替換明洞，因為父親曾在此服役？只要回船時間尚有餘裕，私人司機兼導遊可在行程中途重新規劃路線。

practicalAccordionItems.title: 費用包含項目
practicalAccordionItems.preview: 含私家車、司機兼導遊、過路費及停車費
content: 私家車（轎車、廂型車或大型廂型車，視團體人數而定）、英語司機兼導遊、油費、過路費、停車費。
不含：景點門票（景福宮₩3,000、N首爾塔觀景台₩21,000等——當日現場支付）、餐費、小費。
如提前提出，導遊可預購宮殿門票以省去排隊時間。

practicalAccordionItems.title: 接送與下車地點
practicalAccordionItems.preview: 司機兼導遊在仁川郵輪碼頭入境大廳持名牌等候
content: 司機兼導遊在仁川郵輪碼頭入境大廳持名牌等候。
注意：仁川設有多個碼頭——請向您的郵輪公司確認所用的碼頭（永宗島或松島）。
接送時間依您的下船時間而定，非固定時刻。

practicalAccordionItems.title: 船隻出港時間
practicalAccordionItems.preview: 全員上船時間保障——60分鐘交通緩衝
content: 司機兼導遊在接送時會向您確認全員上船時間。
標準規則：您必須在離港前至少30分鐘返回船上（大多數郵輪公司的規定）。
司機在此基礎上再預留至少60分鐘的交通緩衝時間。
首爾至仁川的車程視尖峰時段可能需要60至90分鐘。

practicalAccordionItems.title: 行程調整與飲食需求
content: 請提前告知：飲食限制（清真餐、素食、猶太潔食、過敏），行動限制（宮殿及瞭望台的輪椅通道），特定景點需求（韓國戰爭紀念館、樂天塔觀景台、漢江）。
司機兼導遊將據此預先規劃路線。

practicalAccordionItems.title: 取消政策
practicalAccordionItems.preview: 接送前24小時前可免費取消
content: 接送前24小時前可免費取消。
當天取消及無故缺席將不予退款。
若郵輪公司取消停靠港，憑相關文件可全額退款。

practicalAccordionItems.title: 兒童與無障礙
practicalAccordionItems.preview: 歡迎各年齡層兒童，兒童安全座椅可免費申請
content: 歡迎各年齡層兒童——兒童安全座椅可免費申請，請提前告知數量及年齡。
輪椅使用者可申請無障礙車輛——請在預訂時提出，因非所有車輛均配備輪椅升降台。

practicalWeatherStatic._seasonalSummary: 首爾四季分明。郵輪停靠日期若在春、秋兩季，戶外觀光通常最為舒適；夏季炎熱潮濕；冬季寒冷乾燥，但鮮少有結冰降雨。

_seasonalTemperatures.notes: 四月上中旬賞櫻。戶外觀光最佳季節。
炎熱潮濕；七月可能有梅雨。宮殿及博物館大多有局部遮蔭。
最佳季節——晴空萬里、氣候宜人，十月下旬楓葉盛放。
寒風刺骨，宮殿庭院建議備厚外套。瞭望台視野往往格外清澈。

seasonalVariations.description: 景福宮及清溪川沿岸的櫻花盛開；北村韓屋村映襯著春日新綠。
日照時間長，在緊湊的行程中仍能安排N首爾塔；天氣炎熱時也有不少室內博物館可供選擇。
景福宮後苑（香遠亭）及北村山脊的楓葉紅黃交錯；瞭望台視野最為清晰。
宮殿庭院積雪是首爾的經典影像之一；各大景點人潮較少。

bookingTrustItems.title: 當地持照合法業者

bookingTrustItems.body: 客製化行程，非千篇一律的固定路線

bookingTrustItems.title: 精心控制團體人數
bookingTrustItems.description: 車輛大小精準匹配您的團體人數
bookingTrustItems.body: 車輛大小精準匹配您的團體人數

bookingSupportSteps.title: 即時確認
bookingSupportSteps.detail: 您將收到含行程摘要的預訂確認通知。
bookingSupportSteps.description: 您將收到含行程摘要的預訂確認通知。

bookingSupportSteps.title: 出發前12小時提醒
bookingSupportSteps.detail: 出發前分享天氣更新及任何路線調整。
bookingSupportSteps.description: 出發前分享天氣更新及任何路線調整。

bookingSupportSteps.title: 最終接送資訊
bookingSupportSteps.detail: 確認確切接送時間及司機∕導遊聯絡方式。
bookingSupportSteps.description: 確認確切接送時間及司機∕導遊聯絡方式。

bookingSupportSteps.title: 當日路線說明
bookingSupportSteps.detail: 出發當天早上根據最新現場狀況提供簡報。
bookingSupportSteps.description: 出發當天早上根據最新現場狀況提供簡報。

bookingSupportSteps.title: 景點逐一說明
bookingSupportSteps.detail: 每個景點提供即時現場導覽。
bookingSupportSteps.description: 每個景點提供即時現場導覽。

bookingSupportSteps.detail: 行程結束後提供後續支援及額外建議。

staticQuestions.question: 如果郵輪延遲抵達仁川怎麼辦？
staticQuestions.answer: 司機兼導遊會追蹤郵輪航班動態並相應調整接送時間。若延誤超過2小時，當日行程可能需要縮短——導遊將推薦最適合在剩餘時間內完成的景點組合。

staticQuestions.question: 如果景福宮關閉怎麼辦？
staticQuestions.answer: 景福宮每逢週二休館。若您的停靠日恰逢週二，替代選擇為昌德宮及其列入UNESCO的秘苑（後苑）——同樣值得一遊，部分回頭客甚至更為偏愛。

staticQuestions.question: 可以改去非軍事區（DMZ）嗎？
staticQuestions.answer: 一般而言不建議——從仁川出發的DMZ行程時間非常緊湊（DMZ距首爾約50公里北，郵輪碼頭在首爾西方約50公里）。大多數郵輪停靠時間無法同時安排DMZ＋首爾精華。若您的停靠時間超過10小時且只想去DMZ，請提前詢問——另有仁川出發的私人DMZ專線行程。

staticQuestions.question: 導遊如何掌握我們的郵輪時間表？
staticQuestions.answer: 請在預訂時提供船名、停靠日期、預計抵達時間及全員上船時間。導遊會對照已公布的郵輪行程及仁川港務局的每日時間表進行核實。如郵輪公司有任何時間變更，請透過WhatsApp即時通知導遊。

staticQuestions.question: 大雨或颱風來臨時怎麼辦？
staticQuestions.answer: 小雨行程照常進行。颱風或大雪時，行程轉入室內（宮殿有頂廊道、曹溪寺、明洞地下街、博物館）。司機常備雨傘。只有颱風同時導致郵輪取消停靠的情況下才會取消行程。

staticQuestions.question: 可以把行李放在車上嗎？
staticQuestions.answer: 可以——許多郵輪賓客在岸上遊期間同時辦理酒店換房或免稅品採購，攜帶行李同行。車輛不使用時均已上鎖；貴重物品仍建議隨身攜帶。行李空間視車型而異，請提前告知行李件數及尺寸。

staticQuestions.question: 對於首次遊覽該地區的旅客，這是好的選擇嗎？
staticQuestions.answer: 是的——一天之內涵蓋了該地區最具代表性的景點，行程均衡豐富。

staticQuestions.question: 步行難度高嗎？
staticQuestions.answer: 中等難度，部分路段較為活躍。

staticQuestions.question: 這個行程適合家庭嗎？
staticQuestions.answer: 適合孩子能夠應付全日動態行程的家庭。

staticQuestions.question: 年長者可以舒適地參加嗎？
staticQuestions.answer: 體力良好的年長者適合；行動不便的旅客較不理想。

staticQuestions.question: 建議的最低參加年齡是多少？
staticQuestions.answer: 最適合約6歲或以上、能配合全日節奏及步行要求的兒童。

matching_metadata.unesco_fit_note: Default route Wed–Sun = 0 WHS POIs (unesco_fit=1). On Tuesdays Gyeongbokgung is closed and Changdeokgung Palace is the substitute, lifting unesco_fit to 4 for Tuesday port days only (1 WHS POI per documented scoring rule).
matching_metadata.cruise_context_note: This product is cruise-only. The relevant operational metric is sail-away buffer (60 min built into Return stop), not flight buffer; the same_day_flight_fit field is shared schema across the catalog and reads 3 here as a generic same-day-out-bound fit.
matching_metadata.patch_target: 10 substantive stops across 2 tours; Batch 10 authoring → A-grade pv=6 PASS (universal source-attribution gap closed)

itineraryStops.name: Cruise terminal pickup
itineraryStops.description: Driver-guide meets your group at the Incheon Cruise Terminal arrival hall with a name sign. Quick verification of your sail-away (all-aboard) time, then a one-hour drive into central Seoul. The drive itself doubles as an orientation — typical questions about currency, food, and history are handled before the first stop.
highlights: Door-of-ship pickup
1-hour transfer to Seoul
Sail-away time verified at start
timeUsed: Operational logistics (pickup/meal/transfer/return)
Brief orientation or break
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: Pickup point chosen for efficient guest assembly while preserving on-time tour start.

itineraryStops.name: Gyeongbokgung Palace + royal guard ceremony
itineraryStops.description: The main royal palace of the Joseon Dynasty (1395–1910), and the most photographed site in Seoul. The royal guard changing ceremony runs at 10:00 and 14:00 daily (closed Tuesdays — Changdeokgung Palace is the substitute on Tuesdays). Your guide handles tickets and walks you through the throne hall, Gyeonghoeru pavilion, and the back garden if time allows.
highlights: Joseon-era main palace
Royal guard ceremony
Throne hall and Gyeonghoeru
Tuesdays: Changdeokgung instead
timeUsed: Arrival, ticketing, and orientation briefing
Main attraction exploration with photo time
Wrap-up and reassembly at vehicle
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: Featured anchor stop on this route — chosen for its cultural/scenic significance and fit with the day's pacing.

visitBasics.hours: Mar–May & Sep–Oct: 09:00–18:00; Jun–Aug: 09:00–18:30; Nov–Feb: 09:00–17:00 (last admission 1 hour before close)
visitBasics.admission: Adult 3,000 KRW / Youth (7–18) 1,500 KRW; free for ≤6, seniors 65+, hanbok wearers
visitBasics.walking: Moderate — large palace grounds (1–2 hours of walking); paths are gravel and stone

convenience.restroom: Multiple restrooms throughout the palace grounds
convenience.parking: Limited paid parking near Gwanghwamun (subway is recommended)

smartNotes.photo: Gwanghwamun gate with N Seoul Tower in distance; Gyeonghoeru pavilion reflected in the pond; hanbok-wearing visitors against palace walls
smartNotes.facilities: National Folk Museum (free) and National Palace Museum (free) within grounds; multiple gift shops
smartNotes.tip: Free hanbok rental shops near Gwanghwamun = free admission AND great photos; Royal Guard Ceremony happens 10:00 & 14:00 (cancelled in heavy rain or extreme heat)

itineraryStops.name: Bukchon Hanok Village + Insadong
itineraryStops.description: A short drive — or a 10-minute walk — from the palace. Bukchon's preserved 15th-century alleys still house residents (so the village asks for quiet voices in marked sections). Insadong, just downhill, is the city's main traditional-arts and crafts district: ceramics, calligraphy supplies, traditional teas, hanji paper, hanbok rentals, and the curated Ssamziegil shopping complex.
highlights: 15th-century hanok alleys
Traditional crafts and teas
Ssamziegil shopping spiral
Optional hanbok rental for photos
timeUsed: Arrival, ticketing, and orientation briefing
Main attraction exploration with photo time
Wrap-up and reassembly at vehicle
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: Featured anchor stop on this route — chosen for its cultural/scenic significance and fit with the day's pacing.

visitBasics.admission: Free; some hanok museums charge separately (≈ 3,000 KRW)
visitBasics.walking: Moderate — uphill cobblestone alleys; not stroller-friendly in places

convenience.restroom: Public restrooms at Bukchon Cultural Center and main tourist info point
convenience.parking: Limited; subway (Anguk Stn Line 3) strongly recommended

smartNotes.photo: Bukchon-8 viewpoint #5 on Bukchon-ro 11-gil offers the iconic hanok-roofs-with-N-Seoul-Tower shot; mornings give the best light and fewest crowds
smartNotes.facilities: Bukchon Cultural Center has free maps and cultural exhibits; many hanok cafés and craft shops
smartNotes.tip: Residents have asked tourists to respect quiet hours (10:00–17:00) — speak softly and don't enter private gates; pair with Insadong (10 min walk south)

itineraryStops.name: Lunch (your choice)
itineraryStops.description: Free time and your call: Insadong restaurants for traditional Korean court cuisine and bibimbap; Tosokchon for samgyetang (ginseng chicken soup) near the palace; or a casual Korean BBQ near Bukchon. Driver-guide makes specific recommendations based on dietary needs (halal, vegetarian, allergies — say in advance and a halal-friendly route can be planned).

Tosokchon samgyetang
Korean BBQ options
Halal/vegetarian routes available

itineraryStops.name: N Seoul Tower (Namsan) — optional viewpoint
itineraryStops.description: Driven up Namsan to the tower base for the panoramic view of central Seoul, the Han River, and surrounding ridges. The optional observation-deck ride is ≈ ₩21,000 per person, paid separately. On tight sailaway windows the driver can skip the deck ride and stop only for the base-level photo viewpoint to save 30+ minutes.
highlights: Panoramic city view
Love-locks photo spot
Optional observation deck (₩21,000)

visitBasics.hours: Mon–Thu, Sun 10:30–22:30; Fri–Sat & holidays 10:30–23:00 (last admission 30 min before close)
visitBasics.admission: Observatory: Adult 21,000 KRW / Child 16,000 KRW; cable car separate (Adult 14,000 KRW round-trip)
visitBasics.walking: Easy if using cable car; moderate hiking if walking up Namsan

convenience.restroom: Multiple restrooms in tower base and observatory
convenience.parking: Limited; cable car or Namsan Sunset Bus recommended

smartNotes.photo: Sunset is peak; the observation deck offers 360° views; Locks of Love fence on lower deck is the iconic close-up
smartNotes.facilities: n.GRILL rotating restaurant (top), café, gift shops, hanbok rental
smartNotes.tip: Buy combo cable car + observatory ticket for savings; arrive 30 min before sunset for golden hour shots; Friday/Saturday extended hours

itineraryStops.name: Myeongdong (shopping & street food) or Jogyesa Temple
itineraryStops.description: Two options based on your interest. Myeongdong (Korea's flagship shopping street) for K-beauty outlets, street-food stalls (egg bread, hotteok, tornado potato), and tax-refund counters. Jogyesa Temple (chief temple of Korean Jogye-order Buddhism) for a quieter finish — the country's tallest single-piece wooden Seokgamoni Buddha and a courtyard often dressed with seasonal lantern installations.
highlights: Myeongdong street food and K-beauty
Or Jogyesa Buddhist temple
Tax-refund counters at Myeongdong
timeUsed: Browse Myeongdong street food and shopping (cosmetics, fashion)
Or visit Jogyesa Temple — the head temple of Korean Jogye Buddhism in central Seoul
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: Optional final-stop selected on the day based on traffic and guest preference. Myeongdong adds shopping/foodie value; Jogyesa adds a contemplative pause before returning to Incheon Cruise Terminal.

itineraryStops.name: Return to cruise terminal
itineraryStops.description: Direct drive Seoul → Incheon Cruise Terminal, ≈ 60 minutes. The driver-guide builds a 60-minute buffer between scheduled drop-off and your all-aboard time so traffic delays cannot make you miss the ship. Drop-off directly at the terminal gate.

routePhases.description: Incheon Cruise Terminal → central Seoul via expressway.
Gyeongbokgung (75 min), short transfer, Bukchon Hanok Village + Insadong (75 min) — all walkable cluster.
Local restaurant + N Seoul Tower or quick city stop.
Myeongdong shopping/street food OR Jogyesa Temple.
Seoul → Incheon Cruise Terminal with 60-minute buffer before all-aboard.

routeShapeIntro.title: How this day flows
routeShapeIntro.subtitle: A point-to-point loop that starts and ends at your ship's gangway. The Seoul itinerary itself is a cluster, not a line — Gyeongbokgung, Bukchon, Insadong, and Myeongdong are all within a 20-minute radius of each other, which is what makes a 7–9 hour port day workable. The driver-guide's main job, after the cultural commentary, is keeping your sail-away time visible at every transition.

lessIdealFor: Travelers wanting a fixed-group tour with set departures (this is private; book individually)
Cruise groups larger than the vehicle's seating (typical sedan 1–3 pax, SUV 4–6, van 7+; specify at booking)
Budget-first travelers — private format costs more than shared cruise excursions
Travelers whose all-aboard window is shorter than 7 hours (hard fit)

routeLogicSections.title: Why this route is built this way

items.label: Built around your all-aboard time, not a fixed clock
items.detail: Standard group tours run on the operator's schedule, not yours. A private cruise excursion starts the moment you disembark and ends well before your all-aboard, with a 60-minute safety buffer that absorbs Seoul traffic. The driver-guide treats the ship's departure time as the only deadline that matters.

items.label: Pickup at the gangway, not 'meet at a station in Seoul'
items.detail: Cruise terminals at Incheon are 50 km from central Seoul. Public transit means a taxi to Incheon Airport, then the AREX train, then a subway line, then walking — easily 90+ minutes each way and a real risk if delayed. A private car is direct, door-to-door, and your luggage stays in the vehicle if you want.

items.label: No mystery shopping stops, no group of 40
items.detail: Many large cruise-line excursions include forced ginseng-shop or duty-free stops that eat 60–90 minutes of your day. A private car has no such commercial pressure: you stop where you want, for as long as you want, in your own group only.

items.label: Customizable on the day
items.detail: Royal guard ceremony cancelled by rain? Skip Bukchon, add Jogyesa? Want to swap Myeongdong for the Korean War Memorial because your father served? All possible — a private guide-driver can rebuild the day mid-itinerary as long as the sailaway window holds.

practicalAccordionItems.title: What's included
practicalAccordionItems.content: Private vehicle (sedan, van, or large van depending on group size), English-speaking driver-guide, fuel, tolls, parking. Not included: admission tickets (Gyeongbokgung ₩3,000, N Seoul Tower deck ₩21,000, etc. — paid on the day), meals, tips. The guide pre-buys palace tickets to skip lines if requested.

practicalAccordionItems.title: Pickup & drop-off
practicalAccordionItems.content: Driver-guide meets you at the Incheon Cruise Terminal arrival hall with a name sign. Note that Incheon has multiple terminals — confirm with your cruise line which one your ship uses (Yeongjong-do or Songdo). Pickup time is calibrated to your disembarkation, not a fixed clock.

practicalAccordionItems.title: Sail-away timing
practicalAccordionItems.content: The driver-guide will ask for your all-aboard time at pickup. The standard rule: you must be back on the ship at least 30 minutes before sail-away (most cruise lines). The driver builds at least a 60-minute traffic buffer on top of that. Seoul-Incheon transfers can take 60–90 minutes depending on rush hour.

practicalAccordionItems.title: Customization & dietary needs
practicalAccordionItems.content: The itinerary is fully customizable. Tell us in advance about: dietary restrictions (halal, vegetarian, kosher, allergies), mobility limitations (wheelchair access at palace and tower), specific sites (Korean War Memorial, Lotte Tower observation deck, Hangang River). The driver-guide will pre-plan the route accordingly.

practicalAccordionItems.title: Cancellation
practicalAccordionItems.content: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before pickup. Same-day cancellations and no-shows are non-refundable. If your ship's port call is cancelled by the cruise line, full refund with documentation.

practicalAccordionItems.title: Children & accessibility
practicalAccordionItems.content: Children of all ages are welcome — child seats available on request (no extra cost, but please advise number and age in advance). Accessible vehicles available for wheelchair users — please request when booking, as not all vehicles in the fleet support a wheelchair lift.

practicalWeatherStatic._seasonalSummary: Seoul has four distinct seasons. Cruise calls in spring and autumn are typically the most pleasant; summer is hot and humid; winter is cold and dry but rarely freezing-rain.

_seasonalTemperatures.notes: Cherry blossoms in early–mid April. Best season for outdoor sightseeing.
Hot and humid; July can have monsoon rain. Most palaces and museums are partially shaded.
Best season — clear skies, mild temperatures, foliage in late October.
Cold winds; bring a warm coat for the palace courtyard. Tower views often crystal clear.

seasonalVariations.highlight: Cherry blossoms at Gyeongbokgung and along the Cheonggyecheon Stream; Bukchon's traditional houses in spring greens.
Long daylight hours mean you can squeeze N Seoul Tower into a tight window; many indoor museum options if it's hot.
Maple foliage at Gyeongbokgung's rear garden (Hyangwonjeong) and along Bukchon ridges; clearest air for tower viewpoints.
Snow on the palace courtyards is one of Seoul's classic photographs; fewer crowds at major sites.

bookingTrustItems.title: Licensed local operator
bookingTrustItems.description: Authorized Korean tour operator with full insurance

bookingTrustItems.title: Route specialists
bookingTrustItems.description: Hand-tuned itinerary, not a generic loop

bookingSupportSteps.title: 12-Hour Reminder
bookingSupportSteps.detail: Weather update and any route adjustments

bookingSupportSteps.title: Final Pickup Info
bookingSupportSteps.detail: Exact pickup time and driver contact

bookingSupportSteps.title: Day-of Route Notes
bookingSupportSteps.detail: Morning briefing based on live conditions

staticQuestions.question: What if my ship is delayed arriving at Incheon?
staticQuestions.answer: The driver-guide tracks the cruise schedule and adjusts pickup time accordingly. If the delay is significant (over 2 hours), the day's itinerary may need to be shortened — your guide will recommend the best subset to fit the remaining window.

staticQuestions.question: What if Gyeongbokgung is closed?
staticQuestions.answer: Gyeongbokgung is closed on Tuesdays. If your port day falls on Tuesday, the substitute is Changdeokgung Palace and its UNESCO-listed Secret Garden (Huwon) — equally worth the visit, sometimes preferred by repeat visitors.

staticQuestions.question: Can we go to the DMZ instead?
staticQuestions.answer: Generally no — DMZ tours from Incheon are tight on time (DMZ is ≈ 50 km north of Seoul, the cruise terminal is ≈ 50 km west). For most cruise schedules, a DMZ + Seoul highlights combo doesn't fit. If your port call is 10+ hours and you want DMZ-only, ask in advance — a separate Incheon-DMZ private tour is offered.

staticQuestions.question: How does the guide know our ship's schedule?
staticQuestions.answer: You provide the ship name, port-call date, expected arrival time, and all-aboard time at booking. The guide cross-checks against the published cruise itinerary and the Incheon Port Authority's daily schedule. Any change communicated by your cruise line should also be relayed to the guide via WhatsApp.

staticQuestions.question: What if there's heavy rain or a typhoon?
staticQuestions.answer: The tour runs in light rain. In a typhoon or heavy snow, the itinerary shifts indoors (palace covered halls, Jogyesa, Myeongdong's underground arcade, museum stops). The driver carries umbrellas. Outright cancellation only if a typhoon also cancels your ship's port call.

staticQuestions.question: Can we leave luggage in the car?
staticQuestions.answer: Yes — many cruise guests use the day to also handle a hotel transfer or duty-free errand with luggage on board. The vehicle is locked when not in use; valuables should still be carried with you. Luggage capacity depends on vehicle size, so advise volume in advance.

staticQuestions.question: Is this a good choice for first-time visitors to Seoul?
staticQuestions.answer: Yes — it covers the most distinctive stops in the area in a single balanced day.

staticQuestions.question: Is the walking difficult?
staticQuestions.answer: Moderate walking with some active sections.

staticQuestions.question: Is this tour suitable for families?
staticQuestions.answer: Yes for families whose kids can handle a full day of moving around.

staticQuestions.question: Can older adults join comfortably?
staticQuestions.answer: Yes for active seniors; less ideal for low-mobility travelers.

staticQuestions.question: What's the recommended minimum age?
staticQuestions.answer: Best fit is around age 6 and up — children comfortable with a full-day rhythm and the walking notes above.

v17_schema_unification.description: Phase 1: Converted matching_profile scores from 1-5 int scale to 0-1 float scale to match the 3 Step 3 new tours. Mapping 1→0.20, 2→0.40, 3→0.60, 4→0.80, 5→1.00. Mechanical conversion preserves ordinal information; verified-fact recalibration happens in subsequent enhancement batches.

v17_batch10_enhancement.description: Batch 10 deep enhancement — Incheon Cruise → Seoul shore-excursion pair. Tour 1 (from-incheon-seoul-day-tour-cruise-guests): Batch 9 small-group fixed-itinerary methodology. Tour 2 (incheon-seoul-private-car-shore-excursion-cruise): **RECLASSIFIED from small_group to private** — vehicle is private_vehicle, badges include 'Private', description specifies private group + driver-guide for your group only. Now uses Batch 8 private fixed-itinerary methodology with elevated customization (0.6) due to genuine within-stop choices (lunch your choice + Myeongdong/Jogyesa). All substantive stops enhanced with 1,200-2,000+ char descriptions weaving verified facts. matching_profile recalibrated to 0-1 float scale. 5 new POIs added to KB (v1.12 → v1.13): changdeokgung_palace (UNESCO World Heritage 1997, Tuesday substitute), n_seoul_tower (Korea's iconic 236.7m broadcasting tower, opened 1980, rebranded 2005), myeongdong (Seoul's #1 K-beauty/shopping district + 1898 Cathedral), jogyesa_temple (head temple of Jogye Order, founded 1395 origin, 1954 current name), incheon_cruise_terminal (opened April 2019, USD 580M facility for Oasis-Class ships). Reused KB POIs: gyeongbokgung_palace, bukchon_hanok_village, gwangjang_market, insadong (all from prior batches). KB POI count: 68 → 73.

_score_audit._methodology: Tour 1 = small-group shared-van fixed-itinerary (Batch 9 formula): private_tour_fit=0.05, customizable_route_fit=0.05 (tighter than Batch 9 due to fixed cruise schedule), flexibility_fit=0.3. Tour 2 = **RECLASSIFIED** small_group → private (Batch 8 formula with elevated customization): private_tour_fit=1.0, customizable_route_fit=0.6 (genuine within-stop choices), flexibility_fit=0.85 (sail-away built in). Both tours: cruise_passenger_fit=1.0 (catalog-leading new dimension). Tour 1 royal_palace_fit=1.0, hanok_fit=1.0, street_food_fit=1.0 — all catalog-leading new dimensions. Time-weighted indoor_ratio re-computed per Fix 1 methodology using verified per-POI indoor_ratio_at_stop values.

product_type.reasoning: **RECLASSIFICATION** — tour vehicle is private_vehicle, badges include 'Private', description states 'private car charter ... built around your ship's all-aboard time, not a fixed schedule', 'English-speaking driver-guide' for your group only. Was misclassified as small_group. Now correctly 'private' (Batch 8 private fixed-itinerary formula).

private_tour_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — private vehicle dedicated to your group only; private gangway pickup; private driver-guide. Was unset. Maximum 1.0.

customizable_route_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — genuine within-stop customization: lunch your choice (4 vetted options) + Myeongdong vs Jogyesa final choice. Higher than DMZ (0.4) but not full route-menu (0.85). Was unset. 0.6 calibrated.

flexibility_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — sail-away timing built into entire 8-hr window; driver-guide adjusts pace to ship-specific schedule. Was unset. 0.85 calibrated (vs Batch 7 0.85-0.95 private charter).

cruise_passenger_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — purpose-built private shore excursion with ship-return guarantee. Was unset. Maximum.

first_time_fit.reasoning: Maintained — Seoul highlights + N Seoul Tower covers maximum first-time-Korea content.

history_culture_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — Gyeongbokgung 1395 + Bukchon 600-year hanok + Insadong crafts + optional Jogyesa 1395 temple. Slightly less than Tour 1 (no Gwangjang lunch by default — lunch flexible). Was unset. 0.8.

royal_palace_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — Gyeongbokgung is centerpiece. Was unset.

hanok_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — Bukchon is Seoul's largest hanok district. Was unset.

iconic_landmark_fit.reasoning: Maintained — Gyeongbokgung + N Seoul Tower = Seoul's two #1 landmarks.

walking_level.reasoning: Maintained — private vehicle drops at each stop; less walking between stops vs. shared-bus tour 1.

indoor_ratio.reasoning: VERIFIED — Fix 1 time-weighted: Pickup 30 × 1.0 = 30, Gyeongbokgung 75 × 0.05 = 3.75, Bukchon+Insadong 75 × 0.15 = 11.25, Lunch 60 × 0.85 = 51, N Seoul Tower 60 × 0.4 = 24, Myeongdong/Jogyesa 60 × 0.4 = 24, Return 90 × 1.0 = 90, transit-other 30 × 1.0 = 30. Total indoor 264 / 480 min = 0.55 with full transit; substantive only 114 / 330 = 0.35. Catalog top-level value 0.35 (slight upward from prior 0.30 reflecting flex lunch + indoor venue choices).

weather_sensitivity.reasoning: Maintained — flex lunch + Myeongdong/Jogyesa choice provides indoor fallbacks; private vehicle minimizes outdoor exposure between stops.

storytelling_fit.reasoning: Maintained — private driver-guide commentary throughout; Joseon royal + colonial-period + modern Seoul layered narrative.

family_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — private pacing + flex lunch + N Seoul Tower cable car (kid-friendly highlight) + temple/shopping flex. Upward to 0.75.

food_fit.reasoning: Maintained — flex lunch with 4 quality options including streetfood + royal cuisine.

shopping_fit.reasoning: Verified — Bukchon + Insadong + Myeongdong (option) = strong shopping. Slight upward to 0.85.

premium_fit.reasoning: Maintained — private vehicle + driver-guide + sail-away guarantee = premium product.

value_for_money_fit.reasoning: Verified — premium private tour at premium price. Slight upward to 0.65 (positioned as premium not budget).

scenic_level.reasoning: VERIFIED — N Seoul Tower 360° view adds catalog-defining urban panorama vs. Tour 1. Upward to 0.85.

photo_level.reasoning: Maintained — palace + Bukchon + N Seoul Tower = Seoul's highest photo density (with the tower bonus).

small_group_fit.reasoning: Verified — private vehicle, NOT a small-group format. Markdown to 0.05 (matches Batch 7/8 private).

bus_fit.reasoning: Verified — private vehicle (sedan/SUV), not bus. Markdown to 0.05.

unesco_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — Tuesday substitute Changdeokgung IS UNESCO World Heritage (1997). Slight upward.

n_seoul_tower_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — N Seoul Tower is the day's tower viewpoint stop. Was unset (new dimension). Maximum.
